summary: [APU Health Monitor] Create query for APU Health Monitor in Engine Folder

output_fields.name: psn
output_fields.description: Unique PSN associated with each APU Serial Number

output_fields.name: ref_date
output_fields.description: Reference Date (latest date only for each APU)

transformations: Join rotables table to rotables_trend table on psn field
Join rotables table to aircraft table on ac_registr field
Filter rotables_trend to include only the latest ref_date for each unique PSN
Filter rotables_trend to include only records where trend_type equals CT5
acceptance_criteria: Query returns all APUs fitted to B737NG aircraft type
Only the latest reference date is returned for each APU PSN
CT5ATP values are correctly populated from rotables_trend.value
Workorder information is included when present in event_perfno_i
Query executes against AMOS Acceptance database
VDS is created in Engine Folder
All required columns are present in output with correct mappings to Dremio names
